\tzpentry{ID3664}{Quantum Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3664 introduces Quantum Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \frac{\partial g_{\mu\nu}}{\partial t} &= \frac{16\pi G}{c^4}\int_{-\infty}^t T_{\mu\nu}(\tau)e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau + \mathcal{R}_{\mu\nu}^{\text{quantum}} \\ \frac{\partial\rho}{\partial t} &= -\frac{i}{\hbar}[H,\rho] + \mathcal{L}_{\text{decoherence}}[\rho] + \mathcal{B}_{\text{gravity}}[\rho,g] \\ \frac{d\mathcal{H}}{dt} &= -2\oint_{\partial V} (\mathbf{J}_{\text{helicity}} + \mathbf{J}_{\text{grav}}) \cdot \hat{\mathbf{n}} \, dS \end{align}
